creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Created attachment 178271
keyboard-layout labels

This problem not new and was sent developers xfce, but still not fixed ...
https://bugzilla.xfce.org/show_bug.cgi?id=12294

I use locale ru_RU.KOI8-R, keyboard-layout labels in UTF-8 but show in KOI8-R [1] (see attachment).
Options for configure “xfce4-xkb-plugin” not exists [3], like in another plugin “x11/xfce4-screenshooter-plugin” [4].

May be add options too and not to use NLS?
